summary: CRIT-200 passThreshold names a DOM-level assertion (FeedList present, EditorPanel absent) but the test artifact (main-route.dom.vitest.ts Sprint 5 extension) is not in the manifest's tests array, leaving the DOM half of PROP-FEED-S5-002 unverifiable from this review scope.
description: CRIT-200 (sprint-5.md line 22) passThreshold reads: 'PROP-FEED-S5-001 grep audit exit 1 (no match); PROP-FEED-S5-002 grep ≥ 1 hit on `height:\s*100vh` in +page.svelte AND DOM test confirms FeedList present, EditorPanel absent'. The grep portion of PROP-FEED-S5-002 is implemented in scripts/sprint-5-grep-audit.sh lines 47-58 ✓. The DOM portion is registered to 'promptnotes/src/routes/__tests__/main-route.dom.vitest.ts (Sprint 5 拡張)' in verification-architecture.md §14 line 744. However, the manifest.tests array (manifest.json lines 14-23) does NOT include main-route.dom.vitest.ts. Phase 3 reviewing only the manifest-listed artefacts cannot confirm the DOM half of PROP-FEED-S5-002. The contract therefore makes a passThreshold claim ('DOM test confirms FeedList present, EditorPanel absent') that cannot be evaluated from the review scope. This is a manifest/contract coordination defect, not necessarily a missing test (the file may exist on disk and be exercised by the regression baseline), but the contract should not depend on un-listed evidence.

additionalEvidence.description: PROP-FEED-S5-002 (DOM portion) registered test: 'promptnotes/src/routes/__tests__/main-route.dom.vitest.ts (Sprint 5 拡張)'. The Sprint 5 extension to this file is the canonical DOM evidence.

CRIT-200 description references 'main-route.dom.vitest.ts asserts FeedList is the sole content surface and feed-main has height 100vh in CSS source' but the file is not in this contract review's manifest.

remediation: Add 'promptnotes/src/routes/__tests__/main-route.dom.vitest.ts' to the manifest.tests array, and verify (via Read) that the file contains the Sprint 5 PROP-FEED-S5-002 DOM-portion test (FeedList sole content surface, EditorPanel absent, .feed-main height check). Alternatively, if the DOM portion is intentionally deferred to the regression baseline, amend CRIT-200 passThreshold to remove 'AND DOM test confirms FeedList present, EditorPanel absent' so the contract claim matches the in-scope evidence.
